scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend && rm -rf backend/public && cp -r frontend/dist backend/public
scripts.desktop: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend && npm run start --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend && npm run dist --prefix desktop
scripts.version: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && git add desktop/package.json desktop/package-lock.json
